description: You are tasked with reverse-engineering an inherited, undocumented theater ticket revenue spreadsheet containing cryptic formulas and broken references. Fix all errors, add descriptive labels and cell comments, and create a 'Documentation' sheet explaining the workbook's logic. Save the updated file to /home/ga/Documents/theater_revenue_documented.xlsx.

natural_language.prompt: You've inherited a cryptic theater ticket revenue spreadsheet from a departed treasurer. Decode the abbreviations, document the formulas, fix errors, add explanatory comments, and create a Documentation sheet so the next person can understand and use it.
